description: Review fixes: Zorro participants bug, dead code removal, and province colors duplication
steps: Fix Zorro participants bug in doZorroPlaceBushi and doZorroSkipPlacement in gameStore.ts - update activeBattles to include Zorro where they have figures
Remove dead code (unreachable else if luna branch inside isDragonfly block) in doRecruitPlaceFigure in gameStore.ts
Extract PROVINCE_COLORS to a shared constant in src/types/game.ts
Update BattlePanel.tsx to import and use shared PROVINCE_COLORS instead of local REGION_COLORS
Update GameLog.tsx to import shared PROVINCE_COLORS instead of defining it locally
acceptance_criteria: Zorro is added to battle participants when placed in a battle province
Dead code branch is removed from doRecruitPlaceFigure
PROVINCE_COLORS is defined once in types/game.ts and used from BattlePanel.tsx and GameLog.tsx
